# final-response at 482ms (258 assistant chars)
 Chat: Issue 11328 live streaming evidence (2)
 You 08:27
   Do not call tools. Reply in plain text with eight numbered sentences about
   terminal streaming. Keep each sentence short and include the phrase live  
   delta in every sentence.                                                  
 Eliza 08:27
   1. Terminal streaming shows a live delta.                                 
   2. Each line is a live delta.                                             
   3. Watch the live delta flow.                                             
   4. The live delta updates fast.                                           
   5. Log files show a live delta.                                           
   6. A live delta tracks changes.                                           
   7. Stream the live delta now.                                             
   8. Every byte is a live delta.
